entry: Marking the book: Our champion mr_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability, and we won 68% of the last 24h of closed trades. The edge is still marginal, but it's measured, and measured beats hoped.
good_signals: our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability
we won 68% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +0.816%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a 0.209%/trade edge at drop 4.5%→target 4.5%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
